title: Vellakkovil Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vellakkovil with a Z-Score of +3.09. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vellakkovil is categorized as CRITICAL, with a CDD of 9.8 GG and no HDD. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, and the wind speed is 13.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The high temperatures and humidity are expected to persist, posing a significant threat to the city's residents and infrastructure.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
